entity.summary: BNB Chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange preserved in current exchange registries and adapter infrastructure, with insufficient recent public activity evidence for a full active classification.
entity.notes: The June 2026 DEX candidate corpus identifies Forest V1 as a BSC DEX, while the current DefiLlama Uniswap V2 registry continues to preserve Forest adapter configuration. HEI consolidates the version-labelled source representation into one Forest entity and uses limited rather than active or dead because recent utilization evidence and a stable first-party site were not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Forest V1 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Forest V1 as a BSC decentralized exchange; HEI models the version-labelled row as one Forest entity.

evidence.title: Forest Uniswap V2 registry configuration
evidence.notes: Current Uniswap V2 registry code preserves the Forest V1 adapter configuration, supporting continued protocol identity without by itself proving strong current utilization.

evidence.title: Forest protocol profile
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reference supports the Forest DEX identity. HEI uses limited because stronger recent activity and first-party availability evidence were not recovered.
